name: Golden Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the dough.
- Mix together all ingredients except the egg yolk until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
- Add the egg yolk and quickly work into the dough.
- Set aside in the fridge to rest for at least 1 hour.
2. Preheat the oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6.
3. Roll out the dough and use it to line a high-sided, loose-bottomed cake tin.
4. Prick the base with a fork.
5. Bake the dough shell blind for 10 minutes.
6. Make the filling.
- Separate the eggs.
- Press the curd cheese through a sieve.
- Mix together all ingredients except the egg whites.
- Beat the egg whites to form stiff peaks and fold them into the mixture.
- Pour the filling into the dough shell.
7. Bake for approximately 40-50 minutes, until the mixture feels firm. If the top starts to brown before the filling has cooked, cover with foil.
8. Serve cold with a pure of strawberries or raspberries.
